compiled_state.title: RED: Write behavioral tests for gh-identity-resolver.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD: This IS the RED test task

Create tests/scripts/test-gh-identity-resolver.sh with behavioral tests.

## Test Approach
All tests use PATH override with mock gh script. Tests call resolver and assert on exit codes and stdout key=value output.

## Tests Required
1. test_own_identity_derives_login: Mock gh api user returning {login:'jsmith', name:'John Smith'}, call resolver --own-identity, assert BRIDGE_BOT_LOGIN=jsmith and BRIDGE_BOT_NAME=John Smith in stdout
2. test_email_from_user_profile: Mock gh api user with email field set, assert BRIDGE_BOT_EMAIL=user@example.com
3. test_email_fallback_to_emails_api: Mock gh api user with null email, mock gh api user/emails returning primary verified, assert BRIDGE_BOT_EMAIL from emails API
4. test_email_fallback_to_prompt: Mock both gh api calls returning null email, assert script exits with PROMPT_NEEDED signal (specific exit code or output marker)
5. test_bot_account_flow: Call resolver with --bot, invoke script and verify stdout contains BRIDGE_BOT_LOGIN=, BRIDGE_BOT_NAME=, BRIDGE_BOT_EMAIL= with placeholder values requiring caller input
6. test_env_id_from_gh_api: Mock gh api returning org 'myorg' and repo 'myrepo', assert BRIDGE_ENV_ID=github-myorg-myrepo
7. test_env_id_from_git_remote: No gh available for repo API, mock git remote -v with github.com/myorg/myrepo, assert BRIDGE_ENV_ID=github-myorg-myrepo
8. test_gh_unavailable: Empty PATH (no gh), assert non-zero exit with descriptive error
9. test_gh_unauthenticated: Mock gh auth status returning non-zero, assert error. Test isolation: ensure mock PATH is complete to prevent leaking to real gh binary.

## .test-index Entry
Add: plugins/dso/scripts/gh-identity-resolver.sh: tests/scripts/test-gh-identity-resolver.sh [test_own_identity_derives_login]

## Integration Test Exemption
Header comment: Integration tests against live GitHub API are out of scope for CI — gh API unavailable in standard CI environments. Tests use comprehensive mocks covering all 3 email fallback branches and both env ID resolution paths. Manual validation performed by developer running project-setup.

## Files
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-gh-identity-resolver.sh
- EDIT: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-gh-identity-resolver.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 9 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-gh-identity-resolver.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 9)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'gh-identity-resolver.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Integration test exemption documented in header
  Verify: grep -q 'out of scope for CI' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-gh-identity-resolver.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: GAP-1 AC amendment: Add test for gh api user/emails returning 404 (scope missing) distinct from empty array. GAP-2 AC amendment: test_env_id_from_git_remote should cover both HTTPS (github.com/owner/repo.git) and SSH (git@github.com:owner/repo.git) URL formats.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
